topic: Nobody tracks this number, but it is costing dental practices more than rent.

slides.title: Nobody tracks this number, but it is costing dental practices more than rent.
It is not what you think.
slides.body: It is not marketing spend. It is not equipment. It is not even staff wages. It is the patients who call and nobody picks up.

slides.title: 15 to 30 missed calls a week.
slides.body: Not because the team is lazy. Because the receptionist is already on a call, or with a patient at the desk, or on lunch.

slides.title: Each missed call: £150 to £400.
slides.body: The phone rings. Nobody answers. The patient calls the next practice on Google. You will never see the invoice for that appointment.

slides.title: Multiply that by 20 calls a week.
slides.body: The number gets uncomfortable fast. And most practice owners have never counted it.

slides.title: We built a system that fixes this.
slides.body: An AI receptionist for a London clinic that answers every call automatically. Knows the treatments. Books the appointment. Sends the confirmation.

slides.title: No-shows dropped by more than half.
slides.body: In the first month. Not because of a new marketing strategy. Because patients were actually getting through.

slides.title: DM me if this sounds familiar.
slides.body: I will show you what the system looks like for your practice.
